question: उन सभी रिकॉर्ड्स के लिए हाउसहोल्ड आईडी (household ID), हाउसहोल्ड नंबर (household number), नया हाउसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर (new household split number) और पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ हाउसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर 1 है, और इन्हें हाउसहोल्ड आईडी के क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.COMPLETION_STATUS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT f.household_id, f.household_number, f.new_household_split_number, d.completion_status
FROM fact_household_core f
JOIN dim_household_status d ON f.household_status_id = d.household_status_id
WHERE f.household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY f.household_id;
raw_output:
SELECT f.household_id, f.household_number, f.new_household_split_number, d.completion_status
FROM fact_household_core f
JOIN dim_household_status d ON f.household_status_id = d.household_status_id
WHERE f.household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY f.household_id;

question: उन परिवारों के लिए भूगोल आईडी (geography IDs) की सूची बनाएं, जिन्हें भूगोल आईडी के अनुसार समूहित (grouped) और क्रमबद्ध (ordered) किया गया हो, जहाँ या तो पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है या नए परिवार के विभाजन की संख्या (household split number) 1 से अधिक है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1 GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT f.GEOGRAPHY_ID
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE f
JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS d ON f.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = d.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID
WHERE d.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR f.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1
ORDER BY f.GEOGRAPHY_ID;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT f.GEOGRAPHY_ID
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE f
JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS d ON f.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = d.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID
WHERE d.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR f.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1
ORDER BY f.GEOGRAPHY_ID;

question: उन परिवारों के लिए अद्वितीय (unique) PSU कोड को आरोही क्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है, परिवार विभाजन संख्या (household split number) 0 है, और नई परिवार विभाजन संख्या (new household split number) 1 है।
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 0 AND T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core f
JOIN dim_household_status h ON f.household_status_id = h.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy d ON f.geography_id = d.geography_id
WHERE h.completion_status ILIKE 'located'
AND f.household_split_number = 0
AND f.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY d.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT d.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core f
JOIN dim_household_status h ON f.household_status_id = h.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy d ON f.geography_id = d.geography_id
WHERE h.completion_status ILIKE 'located'
AND f.household_split_number = 0
AND f.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY d.psu_code ASC;

question: उन जिला कोडों और घरेलू विभाजन संख्याओं (household split numbers) की कुल संख्या की सूची बनाएं जिनके लिए पूर्णता स्थिति (completion status) 'बाहर चले गए' (Moved out) है, उन्हें उनके जिला कोड के अनुसार समूहित करें, और उच्चतम संख्या वाले शीर्ष 5 जिलों को दिखाएं।

predicted_sql:
SELECT
    d.DISTRICT_CODE,
    COUNT(*) AS total_households
FROM
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE f
JOIN
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS h ON f.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = h.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID
JOIN
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY d ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = d.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE
    h.COMPLETION_STATUS ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY
    d.DISTRICT_CODE
ORDER BY
    total_households DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT
    d.DISTRICT_CODE,
    COUNT(*) AS total_households
FROM
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE f
JOIN
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS h ON f.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = h.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID
JOIN
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY d ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = d.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE
    h.COMPLETION_STATUS ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY
    d.DISTRICT_CODE
ORDER BY
    total_households DESC
LIMIT 5;
